notes: Pure foundational file: defines formal group laws over a commutative ring via MvPowerSeries.subst (Fin 2 and Fin 3 variables), with additive and multiplicative examples and the mulByNatSeries API proving [n](T)=nT+O(T^2). The two maxHeartbeats bumps (800k and 1.6M) for fAdd_assoc and mulByNatSeries_add have no justifying comments. FormalGroupHom is defined but never referenced in this file.
